{{Quote|My name is Vu Chusker, and you'll come to know and fear it, I'll see to that!|Vu Chusker|<ref name="TDT" />}}
'''Vu Chusker''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of a [[Color/Legends|blue]]-skinned species who was an associate of the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Cabrool Nuum]]. In the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]], shortly after Nuum's [[Death/Legends|death]], Chusker was killed by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] crime lord [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Smarteel]].

==Biography==
{{Quote|Yesss…Vu Chusker has become the most dangerous being in my life.|Cabrool Nuum speaks of Chusker to Jabba|<ref name="TDT" />}}
By the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]], Vu Chusker was a known associate of [[Cabrool Nuum]], a [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Smarteel]]. By this time Nuum had come to consider Chusker a great threat to his own safety, and as such demanded that the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] kill his associate as a favor to him. Jabba, who had only heard of Chusker but not met him, refused and Nuum imprisoned him in the hopes he would change his mind. The Hutt escaped with the help of Nuum's son [[Rusk Nuum|Rusk]] and killed his captor, following which he killed Rusk and then his sister [[Norba Nuum|Norba]] as well when they claimed power and also demanded that Chusker die. Shortly after the demise of the Nuum family, Chusker arrived on Smarteel to meet with Nuum and ran into Jabba. He questioned the Hutt as to why he was on Smarteel and once Jabba learned who Chusker was he crushed him with his tail.<ref name="TDT" />

[[File:Squash.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Chusker was killed by Jabba the Hutt.]]

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Oof! Doggin', be careful, you big ugly Hutt!|Chusker meets Jabba|<ref name="TDT" />}}
Chusker was a member of a species which had [[Color/Legends|blue]] skin, black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and purple [[Blood/Legends|blood]]. When he was killed he had white hair and wore purple [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]]. He considered himself important enough that he expected others to have heard of him and was rude to Jabba upon meeting him.<ref name="TDT" />

==Behind the scenes==
Vu Chusker first appeared in [[1995]] in ''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Dynasty Trap]]'', a [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] written by [[Jim Woodring]] and illustrated by [[Art Wetherell]]. He was later mentioned in the [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 64|64th]] issue of ''[[The Official Star Wars Fact File]]'' and received an entry in the [[2008]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.
